content.description:
The bootloader (`bootloader.html`) is the entry point for Hobson. It's a single HTML file that:

1. Opens IndexedDB and looks for [kernel:core](item://33333333-1111-0000-0000-000000000000).
2. If found, loads and executes the kernel.
3. If not found, shows an import UI to load the kernel from a JSON file.

The source shown below is captured at boot time from `window.BOOTLOADER_SOURCE`, so it always reflects the exact HTML that Hobson is running from.
